sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْكُتَّابُ الصُّوَرَ الْبَلَاغِيَّةَ لِتَجْمِيلِ النُّصُوصِ.
sentences.translation: Pisci koriste retoričke slike kako bi uljepšali tekstove.
sentences.translationEn: Writers use rhetorical images to beautify texts.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَقُولُ الشَّاعِرُ "الْوَقْتُ كَالسَّيْفِ"، فَهُوَ يَقْصِدُ أَنَّهُ سَرِيعٌ.
sentences.translation: Kada pjesnik kaže "Vrijeme je kao mač", on misli da je ono brzo.
sentences.translationEn: When a poet says 'Time is like a sword,' he means it is fast.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الِاسْتِعَارَاتُ تَجْعَلُ الْقَارِئَ يَتَخَيَّلُ الْمَعْنَى بِشَكْلٍ أَوْضَحَ.
sentences.translation: Ove metafore čine da čitalac jasnije zamisli značenje.
sentences.translationEn: These metaphors make the reader imagine the meaning more clearly.

sentences.translation: Arapski jezik je bogat metaforama i poređenjima.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabic language is rich in metaphor and simile.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الْخَيَالُ فِي فَهْمِ الْأَدَبِ بِعُمْقٍ أَكْبَرَ.
sentences.translation: Mašta pomaže u dubljem razumijevanju književnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Imagination helps in understanding literature more deeply.
